title: Tokyo Metro source audit
scope: PR-015 updates the Tokyo Metro source audit after geometry/inventory pilot corridor selection. Real railway geometry, DEM bytes, elevation values, and public data packages are still not generated.

sources.name: 国土数値情報 鉄道データ N02
sources.publisher: 国土交通省 国土数値情報

license.name: Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International
license.notice: 国土数値情報（鉄道データ）を加工して作成する場合は、出典と加工した旨を表示する。

sources.role: Line, station, and operator inventory candidate. Not a rail elevation source.
sources.lineStationCoverage: National passenger railway inventory candidate. Pilot corridor: 銀座線 上野–浅草. Real N02 extract not fetched in PR-015.
sources.structureCoverage: No trusted tunnel, bridge, viaduct, or underground structure coverage for Railway3D Z modeling.
notes: Use as canonical inventory candidate only.
Do not treat N02 geometry as surveyed railway centerline precision.
Do not derive rail elevation from this source.

sources.name: OpenStreetMap PBF extract for Kanto
sources.version: Snapshot not fetched; synthetic OSM-shaped extract only

license.name: Open Database License 1.0
license.notice: Map data from OpenStreetMap. ODbL obligations and attribution must remain visible.

sources.role: Detailed alignment and structure tag candidate after snapshot selection and conflation.
sources.lineStationCoverage: Pilot corridor is a planned OSM extract target. Real PBF bytes not fetched in PR-015.
sources.structureCoverage: tunnel/bridge/covered/layer tags are structure hints only; parse adapter rejects metric elevation tags.
sources.elevationControlCoverage: None. OSM layer/tunnel/bridge tags are not Z values.
notes: Do not convert OSM layer=* to meters.
Keep ODbL-derived outputs license-separated until legal/data policy review.

sources.name: 基盤地図情報 数値標高モデル
sources.version: Exact DEM mesh product not retrieved in PR-015

license.name: 国土地理院コンテンツ利用規約 / 公共データ利用規約 1.0
license.notice: Exact DEM product and survey-law handling must be checked before public redistribution.

sources.horizontalCrs: JGD2024 for DEM files provided on or after 2025-07-31; exact CRS must be read from metadata.
sources.verticalDatum: Known orthometric datum required at parse time; UNKNOWN rejected for ground samples.
sources.role: Ground elevation and terrain rendering source after exact mesh product selection.
sources.elevationControlCoverage: Ground elevation only; not rail elevation.
notes: Do not mix pre-revision and post-revision DEM without explicit datum handling.
DEM grid spacing is not rail elevation accuracy.
Parse adapter role is limited to ground_elevation / terrain_rendering.

sources.name: Manual elevation control point registry
sources.version: No Tokyo Metro public values approved

license.name: Contribution terms not finalized
license.notice: Do not publish manually extracted operator-document values until source license and measurement definition are reviewed.

sources.horizontalCrs: Depends on submitted control point definition
sources.verticalDatum: Must be explicit per value; UNKNOWN values cannot be used for clearance/depth calculation.
sources.role: Future Q3/Q4 rail elevation, relative depth, portal, and grade-break controls after review.
sources.lineStationCoverage: None for public Tokyo Metro package.
sources.structureCoverage: Potential reviewed portal and structure boundary controls after review.
sources.elevationControlCoverage: Blocked: no approved public Tokyo Metro rail elevation controls.
notes: No operator-document values are extracted for the pilot corridor.
Relative depth controls require target, reference ground point, definition, provenance, and uncertainty.
Corridor selection remains geometry-inventory-pilot until this source is approved.

conflicts: N02 and OSM roles must remain separated: N02 for inventory, OSM for candidate detailed alignment after conflation.
OSM layer, tunnel, bridge, and covered tags are structure hints, not rail elevation values.
GSI DEM supplies ground elevation only; it cannot validate rail elevation without control points.
No operator-published elevation source has been approved for public redistribution.

candidatePilotCorridors.name: 東京メトロ銀座線 上野–浅草
candidatePilotCorridors.reason: Selected in PR-015 as a short geometry/inventory pilot. Inventory, OSM structure tags, and ground DEM adapters may wire against this corridor. Public rail elevation packaging remains blocked.

publicRedistributionDecision: Do not publish a Tokyo Metro dataset package in PR-015. Publish only the source audit, pilot corridor plan, and synthetic adapter fixtures. Raw N02/OSM/GSI snapshots and operator documents are not included.
unresolvedQuestions: Which exact GSI DEM mesh product and retrieval snapshot will be used for Tokyo Metro ground profile?
Which OSM PBF extract provider and snapshot date will be fixed, and how will ODbL-derived outputs be separated?
Can any operator-published station depth or longitudinal profile values be redistributed as derived numeric data?
What manual review sign-off format is required before Q3/Q4 controls are accepted?
How will N02 and OSM conflation conflicts be reviewed without copying source roles into each other?
